# backend/tests/test_customer_ingestion.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-02T06:35:40Z

## Purpose
test_customer_ingestion.py — smoke-check the customer pilot schema after ingest.

Validates dim_customer_pilot / fact_customer_interaction / fact_churn_label row
counts and basic invariants. Assumes `python scripts/ingest_customer_telco.py`
has run against the test/dev database.

If the tables are empty (fresh DB without ingest), tests skip rather than fail.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import psycopg2
- from `_` import pytest

(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

- `test_churn_label_matches_customers(conn, _ingested)`: (no docstring)
- `test_interaction_count_reasonable(conn, _ingested)`: (no docstring)
- `test_churn_rate_matches_benchmark(conn, _ingested)`: (no docstring)
- `test_contract_types_complete(conn, _ingested)`: (no docstring)
